name: Hydra Facial Care
description: A hydrating facial care option designed for customers with dry or combination skin. Clinic staff will check the skin condition first and recommend a suitable care option.

faqs.a: It is a gentle facial. Clinic staff will guide you during the session.
Clinic staff will recommend a suitable care plan after consultation.

name: Deep Cleansing Facial
description: A gentle cleansing treatment for customers who want clearer pores and a refreshed skin feeling. Clinic staff confirm suitability before treatment.

faqs.a: Yes. Students can book and the clinic will confirm the best available time.
Most customers can continue normal activity after the session.

name: Pigmentation Care Consultation
description: A consultation-first option for uneven tone and dark spot concerns. Clinic staff review the skin condition before recommending care.

faqs.a: No. The clinic may recommend another care option after consultation.
Yes. Customers can select an available doctor during booking.
